evidence.stdout:
Usage: index [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...

  Hybrid code indexing system — build, enrich, and query a code index.

Options:
  --db PATH  Path to the SQLite database file.
  --help     Show this message and exit.

Commands:
  build   Parse source files and map dependencies.
  enrich  Enrich code nodes with LLM-generated semantic metadata.
  init    Initialise the code index database.
  query   Query the code index.
  reset   Reset the code index by dropping and recreating all tables.
  status  Show index status and statistics.

assertionResults.reason: Package installable and index on PATH
